sn48.8:1.1: "Pañcimāni, bhikkhave, indriyāni. Katamāni pañca? Saddhindriyaṁ … pe … paññindriyaṁ.
sn48.8:1.2: Kattha ca, bhikkhave, saddhindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ? Catūsu sotāpattiyaṅgesu – ettha saddhindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ.
sn48.8:1.3: Kattha ca, bhikkhave, vīriyindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ? Catūsu sammappadhānesu – ettha vīriyindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ.
sn48.8:1.4: Kattha ca, bhikkhave, satindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ? Catūsu satipaṭṭhānesu – ettha satindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ.
sn48.8:1.5: Kattha ca, bhikkhave, samādhindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ? Catūsu jhānesu – ettha samādhindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ.
sn48.8:1.6: Kattha ca, bhikkhave, paññindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ? Catūsu ariyasaccesu – ettha paññindriyaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ.
